issues.description: Trigger should be 'EndOfTurn' not 'Activated'. '[End of Your Turn]' is a passive end-of-turn trigger.
Missing duration field. Should include duration:'DuringYourTurn' or similar context, but 'EndOfTurn' trigger implies this is a turn-end resolution.

Action should be 'DrawCard' not 'FlipLife'. Text says 'Add 1 card from the top of your Life cards to your hand' — this is drawing from Life pile (FlipLife action), but the full sequence should draw the card to hand, making this DrawCard with source:Life or a combined FlipLife→DrawCard sequence. Standard interpretation: FlipLife with target:Hand or DrawCard.
